Container.Name: TrainDepot
Container.Overview:
Train Depot — a self-hosted digital catalog for managing your model train collection.
Features include hierarchical categories (Steam, Diesel, Multiple Units, Rolling Stock by era), image upload with drag-and-drop, smart auto-fill from a built-in reference database, fuzzy auto-suggest, dark mode, configurable app name, search, and backup/export.
Zero external dependencies — runs on Node.js built-in modules only.
Your data and uploaded images persist across container restarts via the mapped volumes.
Container.Description: Train Depot — a self-hosted model train collection manager with image support, smart auto-fill, configurable settings, dark mode, and a green-and-gold heritage theme. No external dependencies required.

Config.Name: Catalog Data
Config.Description: Path to store the catalog database (catalog.json)

Config.Name: Uploaded Images
Config.Description: Path to store uploaded item photos
